name: mobile-app-comparison
description: Comparing different frameworks for building mobile apps

scripts.zn:desktop:test: bash -lc 'source scripts/ensure-toolchain.sh && cd samples/zero-native/desktop && zig build test'
scripts.zn:desktop:run: bash -lc 'source scripts/ensure-toolchain.sh && cd samples/zero-native/desktop && zig build run -Dplatform=linux'
